# omada_wlan_group (Resource)

Manages a WLAN group on the Omada Controller. WLAN groups organize wireless networks (SSIDs) together.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "omada_wlan_group" "example" {
  name = "Office-WLANs"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the WLAN group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the WLAN group.
- `primary` (Boolean) Whether this is the primary (default) WLAN group. Read-only, computed from the API.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import by WLAN group ID
terraform import omada_wlan_group.example 696a40fd49039e1d13a9c412
```
